TO RE-SCHEDULE THE HEARING, PLEASE REFER TO THE PUBLIC NOTICE TO RESTORE SERVICES ISSUED ON MAY 27, 2020 AVAILABLE ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/. JUDGE: ETHAN P. Plaintiffs' Motion To Consolidate Actions Of Case No. Cgc-19-575947 With Case No. Cgc-20-582192.
Off Calendar Aug-04-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jade Smith, Esq. 415-981-7210 jsmithwilliams@walkuplawoffice.com of Walkup Melodia Kelly Schoenberger for Plaintiff.
Alexander Promm, Esq. for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court inquires about proof of service on the complaint and the motion. Plaintiff reports status to the Court. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiffs' Motion To Consolidate Actions Of Case No. Cgc-19-575947 With Case No. Cgc-20-582192.

Plaintiff's Counsel to circulate a stipulation to get all relevant parties' signatures to consolidate the actions and submit the stipulation and proposed order electronically to the contestdept302tr@sftc.org. The Court will sign the proposed order without an ex parte application or another hearing.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
